nasb.text: Therefore the Lord has recompensed me according to my righteousness, According to my cleanness before His eyes.

esv.text: And the Lord has rewarded me according to my righteousness, according to my cleanness in his sight.

cnv.text: 所以耶和華按著我的公義， 照著我在他眼前的清潔回報我。

ccb.text: 耶和华因我公义、 在祂面前清白而奖赏我。
